name: Beast Within
oracle_text: Destroy target permanent. Its controller creates a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
design_notes: Green's answer to anything — destroys any permanent type, not just creatures. The drawback (opponent gets a 3/3 token) is the balancing factor, similar to Swords to Plowshares giving life. Demonstrates that green can have versatile removal if properly costed with a significant downside. Token creation as a drawback is an elegant design pattern.
